feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import stat
from io import BytesIO
from zipfile import ZipFile, ZipInfo

import pytest

from archive_extract import extract_archive
from archive_paths import normalized_member_path


@pytest.mark.parametrize("name", ["../outside.txt", r"logs\..\outside.txt", "/root.txt", r"C:\drive.txt"])
def test_member_paths_reject_escape_forms(name):
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        normalized_member_path(name)


def test_symbolic_link_entries_are_not_materialized(tmp_path):
    payload = BytesIO()
    info = ZipInfo("links/current")
    info.create_system = 3
    info.external_attr = (stat.S_IFLNK | 0o777) << 16
    with ZipFile(payload, "w") as archive:
        archive.writestr(info, "../outside")
    payload.seek(0)
    with ZipFile(payload) as archive, pytest.raises(ValueError):
        extract_archive(archive, tmp_path / "workspace")
